{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/227850795?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/amwhoi", "id": 227850795, "login": "amwhoi", "node_id": "U_kgDODZS6Kw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/amwhoi", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43944", "cvss": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-829", "name": "Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere"}], "description": "### Impact
_Arbitrary local code execution via deep links, CLI `--opts`, or crafted shortcuts. Affected users: electerm installs that accept protocol URLs or CLI options (affected versions listed in the original report). Exploit requires clicking a crafted `electerm://...` link or opening a crafted shortcut/command that launches electerm with attacker-controlled `opts`._

### Patches
Fixed in version > 3.8.8

commits:

- https://github.com/electerm/electerm/commit/8a6a17951e96d715f5a231532bbd8303fe208700
- https://github.com/electerm/electerm/commit/a79e06f4a1f0ac6376c3d2411ef4690fa0377742
- https://github.com/electerm/electerm/commit/0599e67069b00e376a2e962649aaad6096e63507

### Workarounds
- Disable or unregister electerm protocol handlers (Deep Link settings) and avoid clicking `electerm://` links.
- Do not run electerm with untrusted `--opts` arguments or open `.lnk` / `.desktop` files from untrusted sources.
- Restrict which users can launch electerm on shared machines and avoid leaving electerm installed in locations reachable by other users.
- As a temporary measure, run electerm in a confined account or sandbox (non-admin user) to reduce impact.

### References
- Report / credit: https://github.com/Curly-Haired-Baboon

title: Electerm users can run dangrous code through link or command line
